name: Start Up Business Loans Raleigh
description_short: First Bank offers SBA loans, business credit cards, lines of credit, and commercial mortgages to small businesses in Raleigh, NC with local expertise and competitive rates.
description_long: First Bank is North Carolina's largest community bank, headquartered in the state and operating a dedicated Raleigh branch on Edwards Mill Road. The company serves small business owners and entrepreneurs seeking financing solutions in the Raleigh area, which they note is one of the fastest-growing large metro economies in the country. They position themselves as combining the products and services of larger banks with personalized customer service typical of community lenders. First Bank has been recognized by Fortune as one of the 100 Fastest-Growing Companies globally and by Forbes as a Best In-State Bank in North Carolina. First Bank's primary offerings include SBA 7(a) loans with customized industry options, business credit cards with rewards programs, lines of credit, general business loans, and commercial mortgages. Their SBA loans feature repayment terms of 25+ years, competitive fixed or variable rate options, and what they describe as "complete financing options." The company emphasizes that their small business loan options work quickly, allowing borrowers to capitalize on time-sensitive opportunities. They offer specialized guidance for business acquisitions, commercial real estate projects, and construction financing. The company distinguishes itself through local market expertise—their representatives are based in Raleigh and understand regional market conditions. They maintain a dedicated team of SBA loan specialists who create customized loan strategies for specific business circumstances. Their positioning emphasizes being a North Carolina-headquartered institution rather than a national chain, which they argue provides both scale and personal attention. Based on available information, First Bank appears to be a legitimate community bank offering standard small business financing products. Their emphasis on speed and flexibility in lending appears competitive, but concrete data on approval rates and average terms is not disclosed.
pros: Team of specialized SBA loan experts who create customized loan strategies for acquisitions, real estate, and construction projects
Repayment terms up to 25+ years available on SBA 7(a) loans
Local Raleigh representatives who understand the regional market and business environment
Multiple loan product options including SBA loans, lines of credit, business credit cards with rewards, and commercial mortgages
Competitive fixed or variable rate options on business loans
Fast approval and funding timeline—company states loans 'work quickly' so businesses don't miss opportunities
Largest community bank in North Carolina with institutional resources and full business banking services
cons: Website does not disclose specific interest rates, APRs, or rate ranges for any loan products
Minimum loan amounts and maximum borrowing limits are not specified on the website
Credit score requirements and approval criteria are not detailed
Typical approval timeline and funding speed are mentioned generally but not quantified
No information about origination fees, prepayment penalties, or other cost structures
best_for: Established small business owners in the Raleigh area seeking SBA-backed financing with local banking relationships
Entrepreneurs planning acquisitions or commercial real estate projects who need customized loan strategies
Business owners who prioritize personalized service and local decision-making over larger national lenders
diagnosis: First Bank is best for Raleigh-area small business owners and entrepreneurs who value local banking relationships and need SBA-backed or traditional business financing. The main caveat is that critical borrowing details—interest rates, fees, credit requirements, and specific approval timelines—are absent from their website, requiring direct contact with a loan officer to evaluate actual terms.
services: SBA 7(a) loans with repayment terms 25+ years
Business credit cards with rewards programs
Lines of credit for small businesses
Commercial mortgages for real estate and construction
Online banking with secure access code authentication
Local branch banking at Edwards Mill Road location in Raleigh
SBA loan expertise and customized loan strategy development
meta_description: First Bank offers SBA loans, business credit cards, lines of credit, and commercial mortgages to Raleigh small businesses with local expertise.
